title: Replace with project title
tagline: Replace with: one sentence explaining why this project exists.
purpose: Replace with: the problem this solved.
constraints: Replace with: what constrained the build (time, solo, no infra budget, etc.).
decisions: Replace with: the key technical or product decision made.
impact: Replace with: measurable or observable outcome.
story: Replace with: 2–3 sentences telling the story of this project — the why, the challenge, and what shipped.
